zh.lifeSummary: 當Godgifu 'Goda'於1004年9月14日出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England36歲，母親Emma de Normandie20歲。她於1024年4月7日與Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1055年7月19日在英國素可列維斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godgifu 'Goda'于1004年9月14日出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England36岁，母亲Emma de Normandie20岁。她于1024年4月7日与Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1055年7月19日在英国素可列維斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: 'Goda'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: originally a nickname meaning ‘gold’. It was borne by the former Israeli prime minister  Golda Meir  (  1898–1978 ), who Hebraicized her name from  Golda Meyerson .

variants.name: Golde
meanings: originally a nickname meaning ‘gold’. It was borne by the former Israeli prime minister  Golda Meir  (  1898–1978 ), who Hebraicized her name from  Golda Meyerson .

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Godgifu 'Goda' was born on 14 September 1004, in Devon, England, her father, Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England, was 36 and her mother, Emma de Normandie, was 20. She married Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens on 7 April 1024, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 19 July 1055, in Lewes, Sussex, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godgifu 'Goda' est née le 14 septembre 1004, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Emma de Normandie, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens le 7 avril 1024, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1055, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godgifu 'Goda' am 14. September 1004 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England 36 und ihre Mutter Emma de Normandie 20. Sie hat am 7. April 1024 in England, United Kingdom Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1055 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Lewes, Sussex, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godgifu 'Goda' è nata il il 14 settembre 1004 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Emma de Normandie, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens il 7 aprile 1024, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 luglio 1055, nel Lewes, Sussex, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Godgifu 'Goda'が1004年9月14日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Æthelred 'the Unready' King of Englandは36歳，母Emma de Normandieは20歳であった。1024年4月7日にイギリスイギリスでDreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1055年7月19日にイギリススセックスルスで50歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godgifu 'Goda'(이)가 1004년 9월 14일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Normandie(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1024년 4월 7일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1055년 7월 19일 영국 수세스 루스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.14 September 1004–19 July 1055: 14 de setembro de 1004–19 de julho de 1055
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godgifu 'Goda' nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1004, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Normandie, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens em 7 de abril de 1024, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1055, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godgifu 'Goda' родилась 14 сентября 1004 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Normandie, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens 7 апреля 1024 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 июля 1055 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.14 September 1004–19 July 1055: 14 de septiembre de 1004–19 de julio de 1055
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godgifu 'Goda' nació el 14 de septiembre de 1004, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Emma de Normandie, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens el 7 de abril de 1024, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de julio de 1055, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
